name: Cinnamon-Almond Biscotti
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Whole Blanched Almonds (toasted and finely chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat together sugar, butter, baking soda, baking powder, and cinnamon until well combined.
2. Add eggs and vanilla extract; beat until smooth.
3. Stir in grated chocolate (or finely ground).
4. Gradually add flour in two batches, alternating with the egg mixture.
5. Mix in toasted almonds.
6. Cover dough and refrigerate for 1 hour or until firm enough to shape.
7. Preheat oven to 350°F and divide racks into thirds.
8. Lightly grease two cookie sheets.
9. Divide dough into four portions.
10. On a lightly floured surface, roll each portion of dough into a 12-inch log.
11. Place the logs 4 inches apart on each cookie sheet.
12. Brush logs with egg glaze.
13. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, rotating sheets halfway through baking until firm.
14. Let cool on sheets for 10 minutes.
15. Reduce oven temperature to 275°F.
16. Transfer logs to a cutting board and carefully cut into 20 slices using a long serrated knife.
17. Arrange slices upright on the cookie sheet.
18. Bake for an additional 20 minutes until dry, then remove from the rack and let cool completely.
19. Store in an airtight container.
To toast nuts: Spread toasted almonds on a baking sheet and bake at 350°F for about 5 minutes if sliced or chopped; 10 minutes if whole, halves, or pieces. Yield: approximately 80 biscotti cookies.
